name: DOMINGUEZ CIA, S.A
summary: Global Dominion Access, S.A. provides multi-technology services, and specialized engineering and solutions worldwide. The company provides repair and maintenance services for industrial furnaces; installation, maintenance, and assistance services for the process of receiving and implementing products and services to customers; and trading agency and integral trading services to operators and OEMs of telecommunication industry. It also offers industrial installations, specialist oil and gas projects, system automation, high structures, and industrial coating solutions; services and solutions for photovoltaic, wind power, and biomass areas industrial erection and maintenance services; gas and combustion systems; and industrial lining. In addition, the company provides design and construction solutions for utility, petrochemical, industrial, commercial, and manufacturing industries; marketing services, distribution logistics, support for the wholesale channel, retail channel management, and commercial advice services; and digital transformation solutions. It serves health, education, telecommunications, transport, logistics and public administration, business services, metal, petrochemical, glass, and cement sectors. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Bilbao, Spain.
